creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jessica Clarke from comment #4)

Our LLVM toolchain has assemblers and linkers for all supported architectures.  So nothing extra is needed to build an x86 binary with the toolchain shipped on, say, arm64 FreeBSD.

I was more thinking of preparing data disks for x86-based computers, but it seems that I had kind of missed the point of the PMBR file.
